project_type: Static HTML website deployed on Cloudflare Pages
build_system: Cloudflare Pages (wrangler.jsonc) - no build step needed, static files served from /public
test_framework: None - static HTML site, validation is visual/structural
verification_instructions: 1. Check that the new HTML file exists at /public/pages/agen-tools.html. 2. Verify it uses the same pattern as komisi-agen.html (site-header div, site-footer div, main.js). 3. Verify password protection uses 'petrusjakub' and sessionStorage key. 4. Verify all content sections are present. 5. Verify no 'by PL' text remains.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML site
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible. All work is creating/modifying static HTML files.
contribution_requirements: Match existing design patterns from the website (CSS variables from style.css, dark mode support, header/footer component loading pattern)
key_patterns:
1. Pages use
and
with at end of body. 2. Dark mode: inline script at top checks localStorage 'pcTheme'. 3. Password protection: auth gate with .auth-box, sessionStorage key, PASSWORD variable, shows/hides #protectedContent. 4. Styling uses CSS variables from style.css (--jade, --bg-card, --border, --r-xl, --sp-8, etc). 5. Page-specific styles go in
directory_structure: public/ - served static files. public/pages/ - individual pages. public/assets/ - CSS/JS. public/components/ - shared header.html and footer.html loaded by main.js. Source/Agency/ - source content files.
